name: OnSecurityLocalApplicationProtocolTxFinished
title: OnSecurityLocalApplicationProtocolTxFinished
description: This callback handler is called when the transmission of an application protocol is finished.
As the behavior of application protocols are Security specific you have to refer to the Security Source specific manual to get more information about how they work.
You have to call SecurityLocalStartControlSimulationNode before this callback is called.

parameters.name: char applicationProtocolUserDefinedId[]
parameters.description: The Id of the application protocol, which can be specified in the Security Manager GUI.
